novel_features.name: Cross-venue comparison
novel_features.description: Compare open status, ETA window, and delivery configs across multiple venues in one call.
novel_features.rationale: Fans out the per-venue dynamic endpoint and joins the results locally — no single Wolt API returns this view.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents weighing several venues can decide without N round-trip calls.

novel_features.name: What's open right now and fast
novel_features.description: Filter venues that are open near a lat/lon and deliver within N minutes, with cuisine tag filter.
novel_features.rationale: Joins live status + ETA + cuisine tag in one structured query; no single endpoint surfaces this.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces three SPA card-clicks with one structured agent call.

novel_features.name: Cuisine bottleneck analysis
novel_features.description: Show which cuisines have the longest average ETA right now near a lat/lon.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates ETA distribution across all nearby venues per cuisine tag in one call.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers 'what's slow tonight' without hunting through dozens of cards.

novel_features.name: Order tracking by share link
novel_features.description: Parse a Wolt order share URL and emit the extracted order id (stub — see Known Gaps).
novel_features.rationale: Lays the groundwork for a future live-tracking endpoint once it's reverse-engineered.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Plumbing for share-link inputs that the rest of the ecosystem doesn't yet model.

narrative.headline: Browse Wolt venues and ETAs from the terminal, with structured filters and snapshots agents can replay.
narrative.value_prop: Hits Wolt's unauthenticated consumer endpoints to list cities, find venues near a lat/lon, search, and pull per-venue delivery snapshots. Adds novel filters ('what's open and fast', 'cuisine bottleneck', 'compare these venues') that no other Wolt tool exposes.

quickstart.comment: Find the city slug Wolt uses for your area
What's open near you and delivers fast right now
Per-venue snapshot: open status, next-close time, delivery configs
Which cuisines have the longest waits right now

troubleshoots.fix: Verify --lat and --lon point at a Wolt city. Run `wolt-pp-cli cities --json` to find a slug, then look up its coordinates in the response.

Known gap: Wolt's documented /v4 menu/data endpoint returns 0 bytes via CloudFront. The CLI surfaces this honestly. To help fix it, capture the live menu XHR in DevTools and file an issue with the request shape.
The order-tracking JSON endpoint isn't reverse-engineered yet. Open the share URL in a browser. To help, capture the tracking page's XHR in DevTools and file an issue.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for wolt-pp-cli when you need to script Wolt browsing — agents deciding where to order, trip prep across cities, or comparing nearby venues programmatically. Skip it when you need to place orders, see your account history, or manage a Wolt cart — those need authenticated access that Wolt's bot detection blocks for scripted tools.

recipes.title: Sushi in the next 25 minutes
recipes.explanation: Joins live status, ETA filter, and cuisine tag in one structured call.

recipes.title: Compare two pizza places
recipes.explanation: Multi-venue snapshot using --select to keep response compact for agents.

recipes.title: Where are the longest waits in Helsinki?
recipes.explanation: Aggregates ETA per cuisine across nearby venues; answers 'what's slow tonight'.

recipes.title: Find cities in Finland
recipes.explanation: Quick lookup of the slug Wolt expects for a given city, useful before sync.

trigger_phrases: what restaurants on wolt deliver to <city>

gaps.gap: Per-venue menu items endpoint returns empty body via documented path
gaps.ship_recommendation: ship with documented stub + actionable error

gaps.gap: Order tracking endpoint not yet discovered (no live order to sniff)
